title: glaucium cuneatum
intro: Glaucium cuneatum, also known as the wedge poppy, is a plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Glaucium cuneatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain and inflammation, making it a popular remedy for gastrointestinal problems and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
